glosses.vi: được ưa chuộng; được yêu thích
glosses.ja: 人気のある; 好かれている

translations.es: Aquí la pizza es muy popular.
translations.fr: Ici, la pizza est très populaire.
translations.it: Qui la pizza è molto apprezzata.
translations.pt: Aqui, a pizza faz muito sucesso.
translations.vi: Ở đây pizza rất được ưa chuộng.
translations.el: Εδώ η πίτσα είναι πολύ δημοφιλής.
translations.ja: ここではピザがとても人気です。

tokens.explanation: Common noun (fem. nom. sg.); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Locative adverb specifying place.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'beliebt'.
Adjective used predicatively as the complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Dieses Spiel ist bei Kindern beliebt.

translations.de: Dieses Spiel ist bei Kindern beliebt.
translations.en: This game is popular with children.
translations.es: A los niños les gusta mucho este juego.
translations.it: Ai bambini piace molto questo gioco.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个游戏很受孩子们欢迎。
translations.yue: 呢隻遊戲好受細路歡迎。
translations.he: ילדים מאוד אוהבים את המשחק הזה.
translations.vi: Trẻ em rất thích trò chơi này.
translations.nl: Kinderen zijn dol op dit spel.
translations.hu: A gyerekek nagyon szeretik ezt a játékot.
translations.hi: बच्चों को यह खेल बहुत पसंद है।
translations.el: Τα παιδιά λατρεύουν αυτό το παιχνίδι.
translations.nb: Barn liker dette spillet veldig godt.
translations.sv: Barn tycker mycket om det här spelet.
translations.ro: Copiilor le place foarte mult acest joc.
translations.cs: Dětem se tahle hra moc líbí.
translations.da: Børn er vilde med det her spil.
translations.fi: Lapset pitävät tästä pelistä tosi paljon.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはこのゲームが大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner (nom. n. sg.) modifying 'Spiel'.
Common noun (neut. nom. sg.); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Preposition governing dative, indicating the group/sphere.
Common noun (dat. pl.); object of the preposition 'bei'.
Adjective used predicatively as the complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Die App ist gerade sehr beliebt.

translations.de: Die App ist gerade sehr beliebt.
translations.en: The app is very popular right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo esta app es muy popular.
translations.fr: En ce moment, cette appli est très populaire.
translations.it: In questo momento quest'app è molto popolare.
translations.pt: Agora este aplicativo está fazendo muito sucesso.
translations.tr: Şu anda bu uygulama çok popüler.
translations.vi: Dạo này ứng dụng này rất phổ biến.
translations.nl: Deze app is momenteel erg populair.
translations.hu: Most ez az alkalmazás nagyon népszerű.
translations.hi: अभी यह ऐप बहुत लोकप्रिय है।
translations.pl: Ta aplikacja jest teraz bardzo popularna.
translations.el: Τώρα αυτή η εφαρμογή είναι πολύ δημοφιλής.
translations.nb: Akkurat nå er denne appen veldig populær.
translations.id: Saat ini aplikasi ini sangat populer.
translations.sv: Just nu är den här appen väldigt populär.
translations.ro: Acum această aplicație este foarte populară.
translations.cs: Teď je tahle aplikace hodně oblíbená.
translations.da: Lige nu er denne app meget populær.
translations.fi: Tällä hetkellä tämä sovellus on tosi suosittu.
translations.ja: 今このアプリはとても人気です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (fem. nom. sg.) modifying 'App'.
Common noun (fem. nom. sg.); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative adjective.
Temporal adverb meaning 'at the moment', modifying the predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the adjective 'beliebt'.
Adjective used predicatively as the complement of the copula.

sentences.target: Der kleine Laden ist bei Touristen beliebt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈlaːdən ɪst baɪ̯ tuˈʁɪstn̩ bəˈliːpt/

translations.de: Der kleine Laden ist bei Touristen beliebt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈklaɪ̯nə ˈlaːdən ɪst baɪ̯ tuˈʁɪstn̩ bəˈliːpt/
translations.en: The little shop is popular with tourists.
translations.es: La pequeña tienda es popular entre los turistas.
translations.fr: La petite boutique est très appréciée des touristes.
translations.it: Il piccolo negozio è molto apprezzato dai turisti.
translations.ko: 그 작은 가게는 관광객들에게 인기가 많아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这家小店很受游客欢迎。
translations.yue: 呢間小店好受遊客歡迎。
translations.ru: Этот маленький магазин популярен у туристов.
translations.pt: A pequena loja faz muito sucesso entre os turistas.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng nhỏ rất được du khách ưa thích.
translations.nl: Het kleine winkeltje is populair bij toeristen.
translations.hu: A kis bolt népszerű a turisták körében.
translations.hi: वह छोटी दुकान पर्यटकों में लोकप्रिय है।
translations.pl: Ten mały sklep jest popularny wśród turystów.
translations.el: Το μικρό μαγαζί είναι δημοφιλές στους τουρίστες.
translations.nb: Den lille butikken er populær blant turister.
translations.id: Toko kecil itu populer di kalangan turis.
translations.sv: Den lilla butiken är populär bland turister.
translations.ro: Micul magazin este popular printre turiști.
translations.cs: Ten malý obchůdek je oblíbený mezi turisty.
translations.da: Den lille butik er populær blandt turister.
translations.fi: Pieni kauppa on suosittu turistien keskuudessa.
translations.ja: その小さなお店は観光客に人気があります。
